project.title: Sterling Bond
project.logline: A disgraced ex-CIA operative running a London pawnshop discovers the antique she just bought is the key to a cartel's billion-dollar account — and the cartel already knows her face.

episode_briefs.plot_summary: Maya reluctantly buys a silver pocket watch from Piotr, a visibly panicked stranger who sells it for far below asking price. An hour later, a man named Elliot offers ten times the price with no explanation — Maya refuses. That night she finds Piotr dead in her back alley, a photograph of herself in his coat pocket.
episode_briefs.opening_hook: A cash register slammed on a man's fingers — Maya owns this room before we know her name.
episode_briefs.cold_open_focus: The silver pocket watch under the shop's UV lamp, a hairline alphanumeric engraving catching the light.
episode_briefs.closing_hook: The dead man's coat holds a photograph of Maya's face, taken through her own window — someone has been watching.
episode_briefs.core_satisfaction_beat: Identity Overwhelm — Maya dismisses a high-stakes buyer with zero visible effort, making the viewer realise she is more than a pawnbroker.
episode_briefs.target_emotion: Gripped and slightly afraid — viewer knows more than Maya does.

episode_briefs.plot_summary: Maya calls the burner number; Elliot is already outside — he was watching. He reveals the watch holds cartel account credentials worth $900M. Maya refuses to hand it over without signed immunity and full access to existing intelligence. Elliot agrees — but when Maya opens the safe, the watch is already gone.
episode_briefs.opening_hook: Elliot's car is at the kerb when Maya calls — six minutes is not response time, it is surveillance confirmed.
episode_briefs.cold_open_focus: Maya's thumb hovering over the call button, the dead man's photograph pinned under her other hand.
episode_briefs.closing_hook: The safe is open. The watch is gone. Maya didn't move it.
episode_briefs.core_satisfaction_beat: Underdog Rise — Maya forces a senior intelligence operator to accept her terms instead of steamrolling her.
episode_briefs.target_emotion: Charged and curious — who is Maya, really, and who got into that safe?

## EPISODE 02

[EPISODE BRIEF]
Episode Plot: Maya calls the number; Elliot arrives in six minutes...
(see full text in 02_英文剧本.md)

scene_crosswalk.core_event: Piotr sells Maya the pocket watch for £200 under visible panic — far below asking price.
scene_crosswalk.scene_result: Maya has the watch; she notices the engraving and photographs it before putting it in the safe.

scene_crosswalk.core_event: Elliot offers £2,000 for the watch with no explanation; Maya refuses.
scene_crosswalk.scene_result: Maya refuses; Elliot leaves a burner card — on the back, a warning not to call the police.

scene_crosswalk.core_event: Maya finds Piotr dead; his coat holds a photograph of her taken through her own window.
scene_crosswalk.scene_result: Maya understands she is already a target; she takes out the burner card.

scene_crosswalk.core_event: Maya retrieves a hidden case containing a false passport and an agency access card — she has a prior covert identity.
scene_crosswalk.scene_result: Viewer understands Maya is not an ordinary pawnbroker; she dials the burner number.

scene_crosswalk.location: EXT. STERLING PAWNSHOP / INT. SHOP DOORWAY
scene_crosswalk.core_event: Elliot arrives in six minutes and confirms he was already watching; he reveals the watch holds $900M cartel account credentials.
scene_crosswalk.scene_result: Maya takes the intelligence document; it contains a photograph of her from a prior life — with a face cut out.

scene_crosswalk.core_event: Maya negotiates full immunity and intelligence access before handing over the watch; Elliot accepts.
scene_crosswalk.scene_result: Maya opens the safe — the watch is already gone; someone else got there first.
